Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Santiago T. Sangil, Judgment Debtor appearing in Propria Persona
No other appearances.

HEARING HELD. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Hearing on Claim of Exemption is ordered off calendar. Bankruptcy stayed- Funds returned to the Judgment Debtor. No appearance by Plaintiff. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Santiago Sangil, Defendant appearing in Propria Persona

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted. The levying officer is ordered to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
